title: Black Shield
description: Changes the wood color to black
body:
## The Black Shield Texture Pack:

Shield your soul with a fragment of the abyss. This pack transforms the traditional wooden shield into the **Void**, a slab of "solid shadow" that appears less like equipment and more like a tear in reality.

---

## Pack Features:

- **Vantablack Finish:** The traditional wood texture is replaced with a deep, matte-black grain that feels heavy and ancient.
- **Reinforced Trim:** The iron borders are Shiner to a gunmetal white to ensure the shield looks like a singular, unified piece of dark matter.
- **Stealth Aesthetic:** Perfect for players who prefer a "Dark Knight" or "Void Walker" loadout to match their [Soulless Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-totem).

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48029a093b6ee96a840daa8c1232f57c92cc8137_0.webp)
---

## The Lore: The Void’s Embrace
While the [Soulless Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-totem). were being forged in the Wither's ribcage, the leftover necrotic energy seeped into the nearby armory. **Null** ran a hand across the wood, instantly bleaching the grain into a charcoal-black husk. Now, it no longer splinter's under pressure; it simply absorbs the light around it, leaving your enemies striking at a bottomless void.
